div1.entryFree: Milch, giving milk: like a m. doe whose swelling dugs do ache, Ven. 875. makes m. kine yield blood, Wiv. IV, 4, 33. I have a hundred m. kine to the pail, Shr. II, 359. the instant burst of clamour that she made would have made m. the burning eyes of heaven, Hml. II, 2, 540 (apparently == weeping, shedding milky tears).*
